title: Podman unusable after crash while building an image `Found incomplete layer deleting it`
body:
### Issue Description

I was building an image with podman build and while building my Gnome session crashed (returned to login screen). Since then I can no longer use most podman commands since they report the following error. It looks similar to #16882 but every command is generating the error and I am using `ext4`.

I could use some guidance as to what I could do to repair podman.

### Steps to reproduce the issue

I was building an image with
```bash
$ podman build -f <some.containerfile> -t <some-tag> --build-arg <some=arg> --ignore-file .dockerignore --label org.opencontainers.image.revision=<some-hash> --label org.opencontainers.image.version=<some-version> .
```
then my Wayland session crashed and sent me back to the login screen. Since then most commands fail with an error like shown below.

### Describe the results you received

Output of `podman info` (gives the same error as most other commands):
```bash
$ podman info
WARN[0000] Found incomplete layer "df3134c342b8ee105ceed4e8b2f2d768132d2b3dc46157c5b9a4e8179f321d0b", deleting it 
panic: runtime error: invalid memory address or nil pointer dereference
[signal SIGSEGV: segmentation violation code=0x1 addr=0x100 pc=0x55da3a240217]

goroutine 1 gp=0xc0000061c0 m=3 mp=0xc00009ae08 [running]:
panic({0x55da3b24b6e0?, 0x55da3c1679e0?})
```
